content.title: [code-simplifier] simplify seq_subset: remove dead code, delete gmon.out
content.excerpt:
## Code Simplification - 2026-06-10

This PR simplifies code from the last 24 hours (PRs #9777, #9782) to improve clarity and remove dead/redundant checks, while preserving all functionality.

### Files Changed

- `src/ast/rewriter/seq_subset.cpp` — Remove two dead-code checks and trailing whitespace
- `.gitignore` — Add `gmon.out` to prevent future accidental commits
- `gmon.out` — **Delete** accidentally committed profiling output file (from #9777)

### Improvements Made

#### 1. Removed dead
